description_long: This is a small stone temple structure set on a square base, surrounded by a patch of green grass and flanked by a few large rocks. The temple features a stepped, tiered body with a prominent, conical spire topped by a golden finial. The base is slightly raised and bordered, with the main body of the temple displaying subtle horizontal banding and a central entrance. The spire is painted white with a gold tip, contrasting with the gray stone of the main structure. The surrounding ground is paved with large, textured stone tiles, intersected by dark lines that may represent pathways or boundaries. The overall design is simple, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A small, gray stone temple with a white and gold conical spire, set on a square base with green grass and flanked by rocks. The structure is minimally ornamented and surrounded by paved stone tiles.
description_view_0: The temple is centered, with its entrance and golden-tipped spire visible, and a single large rock to the right.
description_view_1: The temple is seen head-on with two large rocks flanking the entrance, and the green grass patch is more prominent.
description_view_2: The rear of the temple is visible, showing the stepped structure and spire, with a rock on the left side.
description_view_3: The temple is viewed from the back-left, with the spire and rocks visible, and the green grass patch partially obscured.
attribute_ornamentation: minimalist with subtle horizontal banding and a gold finial
attribute_entrance_design: small rectangular entrance framed by simple stonework, no elaborate ornamentation
